_comment: vert.join average:true on the 4 corners of the front face. They collapse to the front-face centroid (0,0,0.5). The front face becomes 1-vertex (degenerate) and is dropped; the 4 side faces (right/top/left/bottom) each lose 2 corners to the centroid → become triangles. Back face untouched. Result: 5 verts, 5 faces (1 quad + 4 tris).
